title: Care Gaps
description: The Care Gaps feature identifies patients who are overdue for recommended clinical interventions, screenings, or follow-up care based on defined quality measures. It enables care managers and clinical researchers to prioritize outreach and track measure compliance at the patient and population level.
tips: Define care gap criteria using well-validated cohort definitions to ensure consistent and accurate patient identification.
Review care gaps in conjunction with the Patient Timeline to understand the full clinical context before initiating outreach.
Filter care gap results by care site or provider to support targeted quality improvement programs.
Export care gap lists in a compliant format for integration with care management or EHR workflows.
Refresh care gap analyses periodically to reflect newly ingested data and updated patient records.
